crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables containing commands for clearing Windows Event Logs

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables containing anti-forensic artifcats of deletiing USN change journal. Observed in ransomware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Yara rule that detects NotPetya ransomware.
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ReversingLabs

values.ParentCommandLine: /c wevtutil cl Setup & wevtutil cl System & wevtutil cl Security & wevtutil cl Application & fsutil usn deletejournal /D C:

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects suspicious parameters of fsutil (deleting USN journal, configuring it with small size, etc).
Might be used by ransomwares during the attack (seen by NotPetya and others).
Detects windows executables that writes files with suspicious extensions
Detects scheduled task creations or modification on a suspicious schedule type
Detects suspicious calls of DLLs in rundll32.dll exports by ordinal
